hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【CRYPTO】美联储主席沃什表示通胀风险已经下降，比特币突破 60,000 美元；【FINANCE】为什么投资者可能希望优先考虑美国以外的债券市场；【FINANCE】克利夫兰联储主席哈马克表示人工智能可能助长通胀，加息可能是必要的。

items.title: Bitcoin breaks above $60,000 after Fed Chair Warsh said inflation risks has come down
items.summary: The Fed chair reiterated the central bank's commitment to its 2% inflation target while signaling artificial intelligence could reshape the economy and monetary policy.
items.title_zh: 美联储主席沃什表示通胀风险已经下降，比特币突破 60,000 美元
items.summary_zh: 美联储主席重申了央行对 2% 通胀目标的承诺，同时暗示人工智能可以重塑经济和货币政策。

items.title: Why investors may want to prioritize bond markets outside the U.S.
items.summary: Allspring Global Investments is pushing clients toward countries with central banks that are raising interest rates or have different inflation dynamics.
items.title_zh: 为什么投资者可能希望优先考虑美国以外的债券市场
items.summary_zh: Allspring Global Investments 正在将客户推向央行正在加息或通胀动态不同的国家。

items.title: Cleveland Fed President Hammack says AI could fuel inflation, rate hikes may be necessary
items.summary: "We've got inflation that's too high, and it's been too high for the past five years," Beth Hammack told CNBC's Sara Eisen.
items.title_zh: 克利夫兰联储主席哈马克表示人工智能可能助长通胀，加息可能是必要的
items.summary_zh: 贝丝·哈马克 (Beth Hammack) 告诉 CNBC 的萨拉·艾森 (Sara Eisen)：“我们的通货膨胀率太高了，过去五年一直太高。”

items.title: Panther Hollow launches multi-strategy merchant bank focused on compliant RWA and yield strategies
items.summary: Panther is a hybrid merchant bank, fund complex, and incubator focused on Ethereum, Canton, Solana, and StarkNet.
items.title_zh: Panther Hollow 推出多策略商业银行，专注于合规 RWA 和收益策略
items.summary_zh: Panther 是一家混合商业银行、基金综合体和孵化器，专注于以太坊、Canton、Solana 和 StarkNet。

items.title: HP Inc. launches Frontier strategic partnership with OpenAI
items.summary: HP Inc. scales its OpenAI Frontier partnership to deploy AI across customer experiences, software development, and enterprise operations.
items.title_zh: 惠普公司与 OpenAI 建立 Frontier 战略合作伙伴关系
items.summary_zh: HP Inc. 扩大其 OpenAI Frontier 合作伙伴关系，在客户体验、软件开发和企业运营领域部署 AI。

items.title: Ethereum gets a new nonprofit focused on institutional adoption
items.summary: The launch comes as the Ethereum Foundation narrows its focus to stewarding the core protocol, with independent organizations like EthLabs emerging to take on ecosystem functions such as research & development.
items.title_zh: 以太坊成立了一个新的非营利组织，专注于机构采用
items.summary_zh: 此次发布之际，以太坊基金会将其重点缩小到管理核心协议，而像 EthLabs 这样的独立组织正在兴起，以承担研发等生态系统功能。

items.title: New chip could help tiny robots traverse complex environments
items.summary: Researchers combined an efficient algorithm with dedicated hardware to rapidly generate 3D maps for navigation using minimal memory and power.
items.title_zh: 新芯片可以帮助微型机器人穿越复杂的环境
items.summary_zh: 研究人员将高效算法与专用硬件相结合，使用最少的内存和功耗快速生成用于导航的 3D 地图。

items.title: Catholic Group Consecrates 4 Bishops, Risking Break With Vatican
items.summary: The traditionalist Society of St. Pius X went ahead with the ceremony, even after the Vatican warned it would result in the bishops’ excommunication.
items.title_zh: 天主教团体冒着与梵蒂冈决裂的风险祝圣四位主教
items.summary_zh: 传统主义的圣庇护十世协会仍继续举行仪式，尽管梵蒂冈警告这将导致主教被逐出教会。

items.title: Jefferies warns against buying the dip in Circle as Open USD raises new competition fears
items.summary: The investment bank said new competition from the Stripe- and Coinbase-backed stablecoin consortium could pressure USDC's growth.
items.title_zh: 杰富瑞 (Jefferies) 警告不要逢低买入 Circle，因为 Open USD 引发了新的竞争担忧
items.summary_zh: 该投资银行表示，来自 Stripe 和 Coinbase 支持的稳定币财团的新竞争可能会给 USDC 的增长带来压力。

items.title: Cantor says bitcoin bear market may be entering final stretch
items.summary: The bank said in a note bitcoin's cycle points to a market bottom in the coming months, urging investors to focus on networks with durable value accrual.
items.title_zh: 坎托表示比特币熊市可能正在进入最后阶段
items.summary_zh: 该银行在一份报告中表示，比特币的周期表明未来几个月市场将触底，敦促投资者关注具有持久价值累积的网络。

items.title: Inaugural Music Technology Research Showcase celebrates work of new graduate program’s initial students
items.summary: Associate Professor Anna Huang delivers the keynote address, “In Search of Human-AI Resonance,” to a capacity crowd.
items.title_zh: 首届音乐技术研究展示会庆祝新研究生项目首批学生的工作
items.summary_zh: 黄安娜副教授向众多观众发表了题为“寻找人类与人工智能的共鸣”的主题演讲。

items.title: Inflation peaked in May as energy prices fell in June, Kalshi traders think
items.summary: Speculators on the prediction market platform give less than 30% odds to inflation peaking above 4.2% in 2026.
items.title_zh: 卡尔希交易员认为，随着能源价格在 6 月份下跌，通胀在 5 月份达到顶峰
items.summary_zh: 预测市场平台上的投机者认为，2026 年通胀率达到 4.2% 以上峰值的可能性不到 30%。

items.title: Xi touts China Communist Party's global influence in speech marking 105th anniversary
items.summary: Chinese President Xi Jinping spoke Wednesday to commemorate the 105th anniversary of the ruling Communist Party of China.
items.title_zh: 习近平在庆祝建党105周年讲话中宣扬中国共产党的全球影响力
items.summary_zh: 中国国家主席习近平周三发表讲话，纪念中国共产党成立105周年。

items.title: China-linked actors target more than technology as AI competition with U.S. intensifies
items.summary: Cyberattacks from China-based entities are on the rise and not just targeting specific tech, analysts warn, as the U.S. AI race intensifies.
items.title_zh: 随着与美国的人工智能竞争加剧，与中国相关的参与者的目标不仅仅是技术
items.summary_zh: 分析师警告称，随着美国人工智能竞赛的加剧，来自中国实体的网络攻击正在增加，而且不仅仅针对特定技术。

items.title: SpaceX to join the Nasdaq-100 in a fast-tracked process that will drive huge ETF buying demand
items.summary: Adding SpaceX this quickly would make the Elon Musk company one of the first beneficiaries of Nasdaq's recently adopted fast-track inclusion framework.
items.title_zh: SpaceX 将快速加入纳斯达克 100 指数，这将推动巨大的 ETF 购买需求
items.summary_zh: 如此迅速地加入 SpaceX 将使埃隆·马斯克公司成为纳斯达克最近采用的快速纳入框架的首批受益者之一。

items.title: 'Time for him to pay' - Carroll calls on Trump to pay $5m after president's appeal fails
items.summary: The writer's lawyers say Trump wants to delay paying the damages awarded by a jury that found the president liable for sexually abusing and defaming her.
items.title_zh: “他该付出代价了”——卡罗尔呼吁特朗普在总统上诉失败后支付 500 万美元
items.summary_zh: 这位作家的律师表示，特朗普希望推迟支付陪审团裁定的损害赔偿金，该陪审团裁定总统对她的性虐待和诽谤负有责任。

items.title: Controversial bishops ordained as Pope warns of 'schism' in Catholic Church
items.summary: Thousands of worshippers attended a ceremony in the Swiss Alps as part of the breakaway Society of Saint Pius X.
items.title_zh: 教皇警告天主教会“分裂”，任命备受争议的主教
items.summary_zh: 作为脱离圣庇护十世协会的一部分，数千名信徒参加了在瑞士阿尔卑斯山举行的仪式。

items.title: Trump made more than $1bn from crypto in first year back in office
items.summary: The president's crypto income far outpaces his earnings from real estate and Trump-themed items such as watches.
items.title_zh: 特朗普上任第一年就从加密货币中赚取了超过 10 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 总统的加密货币收入远远超过了他从房地产和手表等特朗普主题商品中获得的收入。

items.title: Trump Suggestion of a Syrian Crackdown on Hezbollah Confounds Many in Mideast
items.summary: During peace talks, President Trump repeatedly floated the idea that Syria could help subdue Hezbollah in Lebanon. The proposal revived bitter memories.
items.title_zh: 特朗普关于叙利亚镇压真主党的建议令中东许多人感到困惑
items.summary_zh: 在和谈中，特朗普总统多次提出叙利亚可以帮助镇压黎巴嫩真主党的想法。这个提议勾起了痛苦的回忆。

items.title: EthLabs launches as Ethereum undergoes its biggest leadership transition in years
items.summary: In this week's edition of The Protocol Newsletter, we’re diving into the creation of EthLabs, and why it was launched during a period of transition for the ecosystem.
items.title_zh: EthLabs 成立之际，以太坊经历了多年来最大的领导层换届
items.summary_zh: 在本周的《协议通讯》中，我们将深入探讨 EthLabs 的创建，以及为什么它是在生态系统转型时期推出的。

items.title: French banking giant Crédit Agricole rolls out euro stablecoin, EURXT
items.summary: EURXT debuted with 20 million tokens in circulation, backed 1:1 by euro reserves at Caceis Bank, and competes with Circle's EURC and SocGen's EURCV.
items.title_zh: 法国银行业巨头法国农业信贷银行推出欧元稳定币 EURXT
items.summary_zh: EURXT 首次推出时流通量为 2000 万枚代币，由 Caceis 银行的欧元储备以 1:1 的比例支持，并与 Circle 的 EURC 和法国兴业银行的 EURCV 竞争。

items.title: Morpho poised to scale as DeFi infrastructure play, Standard Chartered says
items.summary: The bank initiated coverage of Morpho with a $60 end-2030 price target, saying its DeFi lending and onchain infrastructure businesses are positioned to benefit from tokenization growth.
items.title_zh: 渣打银行表示，Morpho 准备随着 DeFi 基础设施的发展而扩展
items.summary_zh: 该银行首次对 Morpho 设定了 2030 年底 60 美元的目标价格，并表示其 DeFi 贷款和链上基础设施业务有望从代币化增长中受益。

items.title: Forward Industries jumps 17% after expanding Solana treasury to 7.55 million SOL
items.summary: Forward Industries holds more SOL than the next three largest publicly traded Solana treasury companies combined.
items.title_zh: 将 Solana 金库扩大至 755 万 SOL 后，Forward Industries 股价上涨 17%
items.summary_zh: Forward Industries 持有的 SOL 数量超过了紧随其后的三大上市 Solana 财务公司的总和。

items.title: Crypto hack theft falls 7% in June to $76 million as Humanity Protocol tops list: PeckShield
items.summary: Crypto hacks hit $75.9M across 40 incidents in June, down 7.1% from May, led by the $31M Humanity Protocol exploit, PeckShield said.
items.title_zh: 6 月份加密货币黑客盗窃案下降 7%，至 7600 万美元，Humanity Protocol 位居榜首：PeckShield
items.summary_zh: PeckShield 表示，6 月份的 40 起加密货币黑客事件造成了 7590 万美元的损失，比 5 月份下降了 7.1%，其中以价值 3100 万美元的 Humanity Protocol 漏洞为首。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #87.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Venice Token (VVV)

items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第一。

items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 79 名。

items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #7.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Solana (SOL)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第七。

items.title: Core dump epidemiology: fixing an 18-year-old bug
items.summary: OpenAI engineers used large-scale core dump analysis to debug rare infrastructure crashes, uncovering both a hardware fault and a long-standing software bug.
items.title_zh: 核心转储流行病学：修复 18 年前的错误
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 工程师使用大规模核心转储分析来调试罕见的基础设施崩溃，发现硬件故障和长期存在的软件错误。

items.title: New York City educators and industry leaders gathered at Google’s offices to shape the future of AI in classrooms.
items.summary: Google, the New York Jobs CEO Council and Urban Assembly hosted an AI summit for 150 education and industry leaders.
items.title_zh: 纽约市的教育工作者和行业领袖齐聚 Google 办公室，共同塑造课堂人工智能的未来。
items.summary_zh: Google、纽约就业首席执行官委员会和 Urban Assembly 为 150 名教育和行业领导者举办了人工智能峰会。

items.title: Our latest Google Finance upgrades, including a new app
items.summary: The new Google Finance is coming out of beta and launching a new Android app.
items.title_zh: 我们最新的 Google 财经升级，包括新应用
items.summary_zh: 新版 Google 财经即将结束测试版并推出新的 Android 应用程序。

items.title: A better way to model the behavior of metal alloys
items.summary: MIT researchers’ approach captures subtle atomic patterns, improving predictions of material properties.
items.title_zh: 模拟金属合金行为的更好方法
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院研究人员的方法捕捉微妙的原子模式，改善对材料特性的预测。

items.title: ‘An honest, neutral counterpart:’ Bitmine, Sharplink and Joe Lubin back new Ethereum Institutional non-profit
items.summary: Bitmine, Sharplink and Consensys CEO Joseph Lubin are backing another Ethereum-focused non-profit called the Ethereum Institutional.
items.title_zh: “诚实、中立的对手：”Bitmine、Sharplink 和 Joe Lubin 支持新的以太坊非营利机构
items.summary_zh: Bitmine、Sharplink 和 Consensys 首席执行官 Joseph Lubin 正在支持另一个专注于以太坊的非营利组织，称为以太坊机构。

items.title: Solana-based prediction market app on Phantom wallet launches
items.summary: “Prediction markets are one of the most powerful applications you can build on a high-performance blockchain,” said Solana Foundation.
items.title_zh: Phantom 钱包上基于 Solana 的预测市场应用程序推出
items.summary_zh: “预测市场是可以在高性能区块链上构建的最强大的应用程序之一，”Solana 基金会表示。

items.title: ‘We are bullish on Morpho’: Standard Chartered sees token at $60 by 2030, outperforming bitcoin and ether
items.summary: Standard Chartered forecasts Morpho at $60 by 2030, citing vault growth, TradFi adoption and a projected 37x DeFi expansion.
items.title_zh: “我们看好 Morpho”：渣打银行预计 2030 年代币价格将达到 60 美元，表现优于比特币和以太币
items.summary_zh: 渣打银行预测，到 2030 年，Morpho 的价格将达到 60 美元，理由是金库增长、TradFi 的采用以及预计 37 倍的 DeFi 扩张。

items.title: Bernstein sees 203% upside for Circle even as new stablecoin rival OUSD debuts
items.summary: Bernstein reaffirms Outperform on Circle with a $190 target after OUSD's launch sent CRCL stock down over 17%.
items.title_zh: Bernstein 预计，尽管新的稳定币竞争对手 OUSD 首次亮相，Circle 仍有 203% 的上涨空间
items.summary_zh: 在 OUSD 推出导致 CRCL 股价下跌超过 17% 后，Bernstein 重申 Circle 跑赢大盘，目标价为 190 美元。

items.title: Symbiotic officially pivots to collateral markets with Core V2 launch
items.summary: Symbiotic now powers shared collateral infrastructure that can support multiple DeFi use cases like insurance, credit, and RWAs.
items.title_zh: 随着 Core V2 的推出，Symbiotic 正式转向抵押品市场
items.summary_zh: Symbiotic 现在为共享抵押品基础设施提供支持，可以支持保险、信贷和 RWA 等多种 DeFi 使用案例。

items.title: Introducing GeneBench-Pro
items.summary: Introducing GeneBench-Pro, a new benchmark testing AI performance in genomics, biology, and scientific research using complex, real-world datasets.
items.title_zh: GeneBench-Pro 简介
items.summary_zh: 隆重推出 GeneBench-Pro，这是一个使用复杂的真实数据集测试基因组学、生物学和科学研究中人工智能性能的新基准。

items.title: Previewing GPT-5.6 Sol: a next-generation model
items.summary: OpenAI previews GPT-5.6 Sol, a next-generation model with stronger capabilities in coding, science, and cybersecurity, paired with its most advanced safety stack.
items.title_zh: 预览 GPT-5.6 Sol：下一代模型
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 预览了 GPT-5.6 Sol，这是一种下一代模型，在编码、科学和网络安全方面具有更强的能力，并配有最先进的安全堆栈。

items.title: How agents are transforming work
items.summary: A new OpenAI research paper shows how AI agents are transforming work, enabling longer, more complex tasks and expanding productivity across roles.
items.title_zh: 客服人员如何改变工作方式
items.summary_zh: 一篇新的 OpenAI 研究论文展示了人工智能代理如何改变工作方式，实现更长、更复杂的任务，并提高跨角色的生产力。

items.title: Featuring Every Eval Ever Results on Hugging Face Model Pages
items.title_zh: 在拥抱脸部模型页面上展示所有评估结果

items.title: Accelerating Transformers Fine-Tuning with NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel
items.title_zh: 使用 NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel 加速 Transformer 微调

items.title: New research shows how AMIE, our medical AI, could help manage health conditions.
items.summary: Research in “Nature” shows our conversational AI system matches primary care physicians in complex disease management.
items.title_zh: 新研究表明我们的医疗人工智能 AMIE 如何帮助管理健康状况。
items.summary_zh: 《自然》杂志的研究表明，我们的对话式人工智能系统在复杂疾病管理方面与初级保健医生相匹配。

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in May 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from May 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 5 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 5 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: David Autor named head of the Department of Economics
items.summary: A faculty member since 1999, Autor is a leading researcher in artificial intelligence and the work of the future.
items.title_zh: 大卫·奥托尔被任命为经济系系主任
items.summary_zh: Autor 自 1999 年起担任教员，是人工智能和未来工作领域的领先研究员。

items.title: LLMs help robots understand vague instructions and focus on key details
items.summary: To help robots do chores in places like homes and factories, a new approach from MIT uses one language model to clarify users’ instructions, then another to ignore irrelevant info.
items.title_zh: 法学硕士帮助机器人理解模糊的指令并专注于关键细节
items.summary_zh: 为了帮助机器人在家庭和工厂等地方做家务，麻省理工学院的一种新方法使用一种语言模型来澄清用户的指令，然后使用另一种语言模型来忽略不相关的信息。

items.title: Exploring the societal impacts of AI
items.summary: During the AI and Society Forum, leading MIT researchers examined critical questions about AI’s influence on employment and democracy.
items.title_zh: 探索人工智能的社会影响
items.summary_zh: 在人工智能与社会论坛期间，麻省理工学院的主要研究人员研究了有关人工智能对就业和民主影响的关键问题。

items.title: Michael Burry says he's shorting Caterpillar for the first time after it nearly doubled in the AI-driven rally of 2026
items.summary: "Caterpillar jumped out at me," Burry said. "I have never shorted Caterpillar. It has always done great for me on the long side in the past."
items.title_zh: 迈克尔·伯里 (Michael Burry) 表示，在 2026 年人工智能驱动的反弹中，卡特彼勒 (Caterpillar) 几乎翻了一番后，他首次做空卡特彼勒 (Caterpillar)
items.summary_zh: “毛毛虫向我扑来，”伯里说。 “我从未做空卡特彼勒。过去，它在做多方面一直对我有很大帮助。”

items.title: Small-cap stocks enjoy their best first half in 35 years. Here's what's driving it
items.summary: The advance marks a sharp turnaround after years of underperformance versus large-cap peers.
items.title_zh: 小盘股上半年表现 35 年来最好。这就是推动它的因素
items.summary_zh: 此次上涨标志着多年来与大盘股相比表现不佳之后的急剧转变。

items.title: China's economy picks up in June on rebounding U.S. exports, analysts say
items.summary: China's economy is showing signs of picking up after a sluggish few months — thanks in part to a rebound in shipments to the U.S.
items.title_zh: 分析师称，美国出口反弹，中国经济六月回升
items.summary_zh: 中国经济在经历了几个月的低迷之后，正显示出复苏的迹象，部分原因是对美国的出口量出现反弹。

items.title: CFTC is conducting an investigation into Polymarket, source says
items.summary: The probe comes after the Commodity Futures Trading Commission and the Department of Justice dropped previous inquiries into Polymarket last July.
items.title_zh: 消息人士称，CFTC 正在对 Polymarket 进行调查
items.summary_zh: 此次调查是在商品期货交易委员会和司法部去年 7 月撤销之前对 Polymarket 的调查之后进行的。

items.title: Three die in Mexico City World Cup celebrations
items.summary: More than one million people took to the streets of Mexico City on Tuesday to mark the country's win over Ecuador.
items.title_zh: 三人在墨西哥城世界杯庆祝活动中死亡
items.summary_zh: 周二，超过一百万人走上墨西哥城街头，庆祝该国战胜厄瓜多尔。

items.title: Fire kills five at Antwerp apartment block
items.summary: A man was seen clambering through a window to escape black smoke in the block where some 200 people live.
items.title_zh: 安特卫普公寓楼火灾造成五人死亡
items.summary_zh: 在大约 200 人居住的街区，有人看到一名男子爬窗躲避黑烟。

items.title: Man guilty of attempted murder of three children in Dublin
items.summary: Riad Bouchaker denied attempting to murder three children and assaulting four other people on 23 November 2023.
items.title_zh: 都柏林男子企图谋杀三名儿童
items.summary_zh: Riad Bouchaker 否认于 2023 年 11 月 23 日企图谋杀三名儿童并袭击另外四人。

items.title: Syria's president names final 70 lawmakers to new post-Assad parliament
items.summary: Fifteen women are appointed, after only six female candidates were selected by regional electoral colleges last October.
items.title_zh: 叙利亚总统任命最后70名议员加入阿萨德后新议会
items.summary_zh: 去年 10 月，地区选举团只选出了 6 名女性候选人，之后任命了 15 名女性。

items.title: Three-year-old rescued and taken to hospital six days after Venezuela quake
items.summary: Video footage shows rescuers cheering as the child is pulled from rubble in La Guaira state.
items.title_zh: 委内瑞拉地震六天后，三岁儿童获救并送往医院
items.summary_zh: 视频片段显示，当孩子从拉瓜伊拉州的废墟中被救出时，救援人员欢呼雀跃。

items.title: Sudan's RSF committed crimes against humanity in el-Fasher, Amnesty says
items.summary: The Amnesty report adds to evidence of atrocities in el-Fasher, which the UN says bore the hallmarks of genocide.
items.title_zh: 国际特赦组织称，苏丹快速支援部队在法希尔犯下反人类罪
items.summary_zh: 国际特赦组织的报告增加了法希尔暴行的证据，联合国称该地区具有种族灭绝的特征。

items.title: Canada to make Eurovision Song Contest debut in 2027
items.summary: The country becomes the first new participant since Australia joined the contest in 2015.
items.title_zh: 加拿大将于 2027 年首次亮相欧洲歌唱大赛
items.summary_zh: 该国成为自澳大利亚2015年加入该竞赛以来第一个新参赛者。

items.title: Underground Births, Under Bombardment: Childbearing in Ukraine
items.summary: Bombings, blackouts and displacement compound maternal anxiety. Still, many women persevere. “We must bring new life,” one said.
items.title_zh: 轰炸下的地下分娩：乌克兰的生育
items.summary_zh: 爆炸、停电和流离失所加剧了产妇的焦虑。尽管如此，许多女性还是坚持了下来。 “我们必须带来新的生命，”其中一位说。

items.title: After Venezuela Earthquakes, Deportees from the U.S. Are Missing or Found Dead
items.summary: Many of the 146 Venezuelans deported from the United States the day the earthquake struck are feared dead.
items.title_zh: 委内瑞拉地震后，美国被驱逐者失踪或被发现死亡
items.summary_zh: 地震发生当天，146 名委内瑞拉人被美国驱逐出境，其中许多人恐已死亡。

items.title: U.S. and Iran Set to Hold Indirect Talks After Trading Attacks: What to Know
items.summary: Negotiators are in Qatar for indirect talks and ship traffic has risen in the Strait of Hormuz, even as Tehran and Washington remain far apart on key issues. Here’s what to know.
items.title_zh: 美国和伊朗将在贸易袭击后举行间接会谈：需要了解什么
items.summary_zh: 尽管德黑兰和华盛顿在关键问题上仍存在很大分歧，但谈判代表正在卡塔尔进行间接谈判，霍尔木兹海峡的船舶交通量有所增加。以下是需要了解的内容。

items.title: A Risky Burial in the Heart of an Ebola Outbreak
items.summary: Safe interment is critical to containing the deadly disease, but in recent days around one Congolese town, that was not always being done.
items.title_zh: 埃博拉疫情中心的危险埋葬
items.summary_zh: 安全安葬对于遏制这种致命疾病至关重要，但最近几天，在刚果的一个城镇周围，情况并非总是如此。

items.title: A Town in Quebec Is the First Governing Body to Adopt the Universal Declaration of the Rights of Trees
items.summary: Terrasse-Vaudreuil has adopted a resolution to protect trees, which its mayor called “indispensable allies,” as living beings.
items.title_zh: 魁北克省的一个小镇是第一个通过《世界树木权利宣言》的管理机构
items.summary_zh: Terrasse-Vaudreuil 通过了一项保护树木的决议，市长称之为“不可或缺的盟友”。

items.title: The Two Mexico Cities Fighting for Claim Over Soccer’s Origin
items.summary: Mineral del Monte, a small former mining town that became a tourist destination partly because of its Cornish influence, claims that soccer in Mexico started there. Well, so does the nearby city of Pachuca.
items.title_zh: 墨西哥两座城市争夺足球起源
items.summary_zh: 蒙特矿产小镇（Mineral del Monte）曾是一个采矿小镇，后来成为旅游胜地，部分原因是受到康沃尔郡的影响，据称墨西哥的足球运动就是从这里开始的。嗯，附近的帕丘卡市也是如此。

items.title: Archaeologists Find Ruins of Maya Monuments Off the Beaten Path. Way Off.
items.summary: Scientists drove ATVs for miles and then hiked miles more through dense forest to reach a site untouched by looting on Mexico’s Yucatán Peninsula. They named it Minanbé, meaning “there is no path.”
items.title_zh: 考古学家在人迹罕至的地方发现了玛雅遗迹。太远了。
items.summary_zh: 科学家们驾驶全地形车行驶了数英里，然后又徒步数英里穿过茂密的森林，到达墨西哥尤卡坦半岛未受掠夺的地点。他们将其命名为Minanbé，意思是“没有路”。

items.title: Trump Officials Sideline Machado, Venezuela’s Opposition Leader, Over Earthquake Response
items.summary: U.S. officials called a bid by María Corina Machado, the Nobel Peace Prize winner, to return to earthquake-battered Venezuela a “political stunt” that has distracted from recovery efforts.
items.title_zh: 特朗普官员在地震应对问题上对委内瑞拉反对派领袖马查多置之不理
items.summary_zh: 美国官员称诺贝尔和平奖获得者玛丽亚·科里娜·马查多重返遭受地震重创的委内瑞拉的提议是“政治噱头”，分散了人们对恢复工作的注意力。

items.title: Goliath Ventures CEO pleads guilty in $400 million crypto Ponzi case
